title: PDF Viewer compact stack (fix inflated gaps)
description:
Viewer sheets were still stacked using inflated 5× footprint heights from old map builds, creating huge vertical gaps and an oversized container. Layout now always uses intrinsic PDF piece dimensions (natW/natH / legacy piece size), dedupes by doc+name as well as storageKey, and shrink-wraps the scroll container to the zoomport so zoom-out does not reveal a giant grey frame.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg60).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Repair inflated viewer page h/w from legacy 5× footprint.
Dedupe viewer sheets by storageKey or doc+name.
Scroll container shrink-wraps to sheet stack size.
